display.purpose: Page-level section headings and hero titles. Responsive staircase: 1.875rem (mobile) → 2.25rem (sm, 640px+) → 3rem (lg, 1024px+). Never set at a flat large size — Indonesian copy overflows 375px viewports. One or two per viewport. Fraunces Variable at maximum expressiveness.

headline.purpose: Section titles inside cards and panels (e.g. Tentang [Name], Status kesehatan). Fixed at ~1.5rem — does not scale responsively. Still Fraunces, but at a supporting scale.

body.purpose: Story text, descriptions, form labels, all UI copy. Line length capped at 65ch on prose. Geist Variable — the conversational voice.

label.purpose: Section dividers, filter section titles, metadata prefixes. Applied via the label-eyebrow utility. Always uppercase with 0.05em tracking.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Pet listing cards only — appears on hover, never at rest.

shadows.name: selected-micro
shadows.purpose: Active gallery thumbnail. Confirms the selected photo.

shadows.name: tonal-ring
shadows.purpose: Alternative to borders on card and photo containers. Tonal, not structural.

motion.name: paw-fade-up
motion.purpose: Pet listing card entrance. Staggered by 55ms per card. Automatically disabled by prefers-reduced-motion via global CSS override.

motion.name: paw-fade-in
motion.purpose: Page-level fade on route transition. Also used for gallery photo swap (0.25s). Disabled by prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrance animations. Exponential ease-out — snappy start, graceful settle.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default CTA. Terracotta fill, near-white text. Apply and submit actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M19 14c1.49-1.46 3-3.21 3-5.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 16.5 3c-1.76 0-3 .5-4.5 2-1.5-1.5-2.74-2-4.5-2A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 2 8.5c0 2.3 1.5 4.05 3 5.5l7 7Z"/></svg>Ajukan lamaran adopsi</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Warm border, fills muted on hover. Adjacent to primary when two actions coexist.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 57); transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.968 0.008 57); color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8 / 50%); }

components.name: Filter Species Pill
components.description: Species and filter toggle pills. 44px touch target, rounded-full, active = coral fill.
components.css: .ds-filter-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; background: oklch(0.968 0.008 57); color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-filter-pill.active { background: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-filter-pill:hover:not(.active) { background: oklch(0.94 0.008 57); color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); } .ds-filter-pill:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0 0), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Application and adoption status pill. Semantic color pairs only — never brand primary.
components.html: DisetujuiMeet & GreetTerkirimDitolak
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--success { background: oklch(0.955 0.052 148); color: oklch(0.37 0.098 148); } .ds-badge--warning { background: oklch(0.96 0.065 90); color: oklch(0.40 0.12 65); } .ds-badge--info { background: oklch(0.97 0.014 238); color: oklch(0.39 0.13 248); } .ds-badge--muted { background: oklch(0.968 0.008 57); color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); } .ds-badge--destructive { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 10%); color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); }

components.name: WhatsApp CTA (Default)
components.description: Full-width WhatsApp contact button. Brand-locked wa-green only. Used in pet detail lister card.
components.html: Hubungi shelter via WhatsApp
components.css: .ds-wa-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 2.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px; background: oklch(0.72 0.19 155); color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-wa-cta:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-wa-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.72 0.19 155 / 50%); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Stroke-only, warm border, three-layer focus ring.
components.html: Rata-rata pada hari kerja.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 57); border-radius: 0.625rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8 / 50%); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 20%); } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); } .ds-input-hint { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Pet Listing Card
components.description: The primary browse surface. Photo-led, 4:3 aspect, hover lifts with shadow. The entire card is an anchor.
components.html:
Mendesak

Miko

Golden Retriever

3 tahun · Jantan · Besar
components.css: .ds-pet-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 57); background: oklch(1 0 0); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-pet-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8 / 30%); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-pet-card__photo { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(0.968 0.008 57); } .ds-pet-card__photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-pet-card:hover .ds-pet-card__photo img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-pet-card__badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-pet-card__badge--urgent { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-pet-card__body { padding: 1rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-pet-card__name { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); line-height: 1.2; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .ds-pet-card__breed { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-pet-card__meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); margin: 0; }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Sticky translucent header with wordmark, nav links, and account affordance.
components.html:
PawPath
JelajahiLamaranku
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 57); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 95%); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-header__inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; height: 4rem; gap: 12px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-wordmark { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-wordmark span { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-left: 16px; } .ds-nav__link { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.556 0.012 57); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav__link:hover { background: oklch(0.968 0.008 57); color: oklch(0.145 0.008 57); } .ds-nav__link--active { color: oklch(0.598 0.155 28.8); }

narrative.overview:
PawPath is a warm, purposeful adoption marketplace built for Indonesian families and animals finding each other. The design system's central conviction: adoption is mutual discovery, unhurried, trusting, and emotionally real. Every screen should feel like meeting someone who already feels like home — not browsing a catalog, not filling out a form, but recognizing something.

The palette is coral-led, not product-blue. Surfaces stay warm and unbleached. Typography mixes Fraunces Variable's inkstone weight for headlines with Geist Variable's quiet confidence for body copy. Motion is restrained: animals breathe into view on load, never performed. Interactivity acknowledges the user without demanding attention.

This system explicitly rejects: clinical white with system-blue CTAs, SaaS-cream with purple gradients, neon on dark, and anything that prioritizes tech-brand signals over emotional honesty.
keyCharacteristics: Coral primary as the emotional center, not a decorative accent
Warm off-white (Husked Linen) surfaces that never feel sterile
Fraunces reserved for display and page titles only; Geist carries all UI
Flat-by-default elevation with shadow only in hover state
Semantic status palette kept entirely separate from brand accents
44px touch minimum enforced on all custom interactive elements

rules.name: The One Anchor Rule
rules.body: Terracotta Warmth appears on at most one focal element per screen region. Its rarity is what makes it trustworthy. Stack two primary CTAs and both become noise.

rules.name: The Semantic Firewall Rule
rules.body: Status colors are never used as decorative accents, and WhatsApp Leaf is never used for non-WhatsApp elements. Crossing these lines makes the status system unreadable.

rules.name: The Fraunces Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is used only for h1 and h2 page/section headings. Never in buttons, navigation, labels, body copy, or any UI text below title level. Its character depends entirely on its rarity.

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: No text renders below 0.68rem (10.9px). This is the absolute floor for badges, tags, and step labels.

rules.name: The Responsive Staircase Rule
rules.body: Every heading that uses a size in the 2–3rem range must have a three-step mobile-first staircase: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl. A heading at a fixed large size breaks Indonesian copy on 375px viewports where character counts run long.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: No resting shadows, anywhere. Surfaces sit on the canvas. Shadow is a response to interaction (hover), confirmed selection (thumbnail), or physical fixed position (header). It is never a default styling decision.

dos: Do use the label-eyebrow utility for every section divider, filter section title, and metadata prefix.
Do maintain min-h-11 (2.75rem, 44px) on every custom button not using the Button component.
Do apply focus-visible rings to all custom button elements not using the Button component.
Do use OKLCH for every new color value. Never introduce hex or HSL into the token system.
Do wire aria-describedby on form fields where inline errors or hint text exist.
Do use aria-pressed on toggle-style selection buttons and aria-current=step on wizard step indicators.
Do use Fraunces (font-display) for h1 and h2 headings only. All UI copy uses Geist.
Do add onError fallback handlers to every img tag, resolving to /images/placeholder.svg.
Do use min-h-[100dvh] for the app shell, not min-h-screen, to prevent iOS Safari URL bar layout jumps.
Do step display type down for mobile: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl is the standard staircase.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. Use full borders or background tints.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient fill. Gradient text is prohibited.
Don't use glassmorphism outside the site header.
Don't hardcode Tailwind semantic colors (bg-green-100, bg-amber-100, bg-blue-50). Always use the token classes.
Don't use --wa-green for anything other than a WhatsApp CTA element.
Don't add box-shadow to resting cards. Shadow is an interaction response only.
Don't place external URLs in onError image handlers. All fallbacks must use /images/placeholder.svg.
Don't use the hero-metric template. The dashboard uses data; it does not perform it.
Don't set a flat large heading size. Indonesian strings overflow 375px viewports at text-5xl — always use the responsive staircase.
Don't use calc(100vh) in sticky or fixed layouts. Use calc(100dvh) so the iOS Safari URL bar doesn't push content off-screen.
